title: pellionia viridis var. basiinaequalis
intro: Pellionia viridis var. basiinaequalis is a lesser-known variety of the Pellionia viridis plant, also known as the 'Polynesian ivy' or 'Pellionia', a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. Pellionia viridis var. basiinaequalis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pellionia viridis var. basiinaequalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and provide relief from respiratory issues. Pellionia viridis var. basiinaequalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal purposes.
